raw.subject: Your McAllen page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

There's something so special about gaining pups' trust over time, and I've seen it happen with the photos of Daisy and Biscuit on your Facebook page.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and that might be costing you bookings from people who prefer to plan ahead.

I sketched a page idea that highlights your services overview, photo gallery, and contact section, which seems like a great fit for your business.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/madeline-s-grooming-spa-mcallen

Would love to discuss how a website can help you reach more clients in McAllen, and I offer a flat fee for local businesses. Let's talk soon.
